message:
test(fcp-sdk): add tracing span contract verification for RetryLoop

Add tracing_contract.rs integration test validating that
RetryLoop::execute() emits the structured tracing fields required by
the FCP3 forensics standard: operation name, attempt number, outcome
classification, and timing metadata in the expected span hierarchy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
